design_system.theme_description: Retro-futuristic Japanese, blending traditional Ukiyo-e aesthetics with warm, optimistic Solarpunk and technical UI elements.

background_secondary.usage: Agenda section background, dark mode sections, footer

accent_primary.usage: Manifesto background, primary call-to-action buttons, 'GET TICKETS' banner

accent_secondary.usage: Date highlights, speaker names, subtle text accents

text_dark.usage: Primary reading text on light backgrounds

text_light.usage: Text on dark or orange backgrounds

primary_headings.usage: Main titles (e.g., 'NEO MIRAI AI DESIGN CONFERENCE', 'AGENDA', 'SPEAKERS')

editorial_text.usage: Subtitles, quotes, manifesto copy (e.g., 'Three days of ideas...', 'We believe the future is...')
editorial_text.weight: Regular or slightly italicized in places

technical_ui_text.usage: Navigation menu, dates, micro-copy, ticket prices

accents.usage: Decorative typographic elements aligned with traditional Japanese layout styles

layout_and_structure.grid_system: Strict, editorial-style grid with visible architectural linework.
layout_and_structure.dividers: 1px solid lines (dark on light backgrounds, light on dark backgrounds) separating sections and creating a blueprint-like feel.
layout_and_structure.manifesto_section: Distinctive square grid pattern overlaying the solid burnt-orange background.
layout_and_structure.alignment: Mix of strict left-alignment for text blocks and dynamic, asymmetrical placement of images alongside text.

buttons_primary.background: Solid burnt orange or soft black
buttons_primary.iconography: Thin right-facing arrows embedded within circles

buttons_secondary.shape: Text-only with an adjacent circular icon
buttons_secondary.border: 1px solid line on the circular icon

navigation_bar.style: Minimalist, sticky top or absolute top
navigation_bar.active_state: Small black dot centered underneath the active menu item (e.g., under 'HOME')

imagery_and_art_direction.style: Painterly digital illustration, heavily textured to look like canvas or traditional printmaking.
motifs: Giant, imposing geometric shapes (suns, spheres, black holes)
Traditional Japanese architecture (pagodas, sweeping roofs) integrated with futuristic spires and transport tubes
Tiny silhouetted human figures to establish massive scale
Bonsai trees and autumn foliage serving as framing elements
imagery_and_art_direction.color_grading: Warm, sepia-toned, 'golden hour' lighting across all illustrations to maintain a cohesive, nostalgic-yet-futuristic atmosphere.
